feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Service Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Service Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - How to create a Premise
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create a premise via SAP Service cloud - Utilities Add on. When i go to Premise i don´t have the option to create a new premise.

Can i create a premise via Service cloud?

Thanks,

Rita

entry.title: 3rd party application integration with SAP Service Cloud V2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We are trying to integrate a third-party application to SAP Service Cloud V2. Our requirement is to Integrate the application and embed its screen. We require this embedded screen to be always accessible similar to productivity tools (CTI Widget, Built-In Support, Notifications etc) that are always available irrespective of which screen we are in.

We tried different routes like Mashup, separate tab etc but those are not feasible as those will be available only when we will we select them. Our requirement is to keep the embedded screen always available. Any pointers with regards to this will be really appreciated.

Best Regards,

Imran

entry.title: C4C: Adding Additional Filters for Archiving Search
entry.content:
Hi - is there a way to add additional search criteria, like Customer ID when searching archived data via Admin > Archiving > Search functionality?

Currently, we can only search below, but I need to specifically search archived data of a customer

Thanks in advance!

Cheers,.

Marc

entry.title: Updating Extension Field with External Hook in SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on updating an extension field called zWebSite in SAP, where I want to store the website obtained from the Organizational Unit entity using ExtenalHook PreHook. To achieve this, I developed a small application in SAP BTP. However, I am encountering an issue with the following error:

Custom logic error: FAILED_PRECONDITION: Error raised from the external system with HTTP Status Code: 500 "Request failed with status code 422".

My code(JS):

I am wondering about the correct structure for the update. Specifically, I would like to know:

Is it necessary to send the entire currentImage data in the update request, or is it sufficient to only send the extension field zWebSite?

I appreciate any help or suggestions you can provide.

Thank you!

entry.title: Outbound SMS / WhatsApp Message from SAP Service Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on a business requirement which requires outbound SMS or WhatsApp to be sent to the customer based on his service ticket status change in SAP Service cloud.

We are evaluating integration with Bird and Twilio, from the online documentation and blogs I could find that there is No out of box integration of Bird with SAP service cloud.

If anyone has done integration of SAP service cloud with Twilio could they please share their experience and  some information on - if out of box integration is possible or we have to go via customization only ?

And if customization - what steps did you take to integrate with Twilio or Bird.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Kapil Kumar

SAP Customer Experience Foundation  SAP Service Cloud SAP Sales Cloud

entry.title: Re: How to create a relative selection for Task Approver...
entry.content:
Hello,

as you might know the Data Source "Approval Task Details" only draws results if it is joined with an application created data source as an anchor. More about this in the following KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/0002599498

Your requirement to create a relative selection for the field "Task Approver" can be achieved by joining the "Employee Master Data" Data Source as well. 

In the attached example, the application created Data Source "Ticket" is joined with the "Approval Task Details" Data Source based on the attributes "Ticket" and "Business Document UUID". The "Approval Task Details" Data Source is joined with the "Employee Master Data" Data Source based on the attributes "Task Approver" and "User". 

Finally, in the Report you build on top of this joined Data Source, use the "Employee" attribute from the "Employee Master Data" Data Source for your relative selection. You might want to consider renaming it so it is easier to identify.

Kind regards,

Konstantin

entry.title: Capturing Survey Response in C4C
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to capture survey responses in C4C that will be sent from a third-party system. I’ve reviewed the OData documentation, which states that we can’t create survey responses via the API. Is there an alternative approach we can consider to achieve this?

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud Workflow field update use string in the formula
entry.content:
Hello experts, 
I want to concatenate two strings with a workflow in SAP Service Cloud (V1), workflow type field update.
Is it possible to have a blank space between it? 
I tried with " or ' but it is not working, it is showing a syntax error... 

Does somebody have a tip?

Thanks a lot!

Deborah

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Certification Question for HR Services (Ask HR) implementation
entry.content:
We will be needing to certify to implement HR Service Centre for one of our customers. The learning journey offers 2 certifications for this, one general one and one for v2. This is a new implementation. We do not know which certification we should take. Can you help? 

I find in general there is very little documentation around for this. 

Thanks very much for your help,

 

Dana

entry.title: Change the file name of a Custom Form Template PDF (SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content:
For SAP Business ByDesign I have created a PDI solution with a custom form template that is based on a custom business object.

The Form Template Header description defined in SAP Cloud Applications Studio is passed as the PDF name when I preview the form.

 

 

How can I change the file name of the PDF? I want to it to be my business object instance ID.

I would assume that this setting must be done in the .xdp file in Adobe Lifecycle Designer.

 

 

 

SAP has defined such logic for Sales Order Confirmations so when I save an output Sales Order Confirmation the Sales Order ID is included in the file name.

 

any ideas?

entry.title: Workbooks for SAP Cloud Service
entry.content: I'm preparing to certify in SAP Service Cloud as we will implement Employee Central Service Center. With Successfactors we always use workbooks to get the customer requirements. I cannot find anything similar for SAP Cloud Service. Can you confirm if there are workbooks or what do consultants use to get the customer requirements?

entry.title: ¿How to obtain the latitude and longitude coordinates selected in google map in a mashup in sap c4c?
entry.content:
Hello experts,
Create an EC with 2 custom fields (Latitude and Longitude) where that EC will be placed in the tickets object.
What I need is to create a mashup with Google Map and when selecting it I can obtain the latitude and longitude that was marked.
Is it possible to do that?
Could you help me?

Thank you so much

entry.title: POST Survey Response into C4C through OData API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to post survey responses from an external system to SAP C4C using the OData API. We’ve looked into the following API: [https://myXXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('ObjectID')/SurveyResponse]

While it successfully creates the survey in C4C associated with a phone call, it's not updating the survey answers. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Design Reports - How many days ago the last sales order was created
entry.content:
Hello Design Reports Experts!!

I would like to create an index (Key Figure) to display how many days ago the last sales order was created for the customer via Key Figure in a report.
The idea would be to first perform a filter to list only the last sales order created for the customer, and then use the “created on” field of the sales order to perform the calculation.

Example image:
Customer placed the last order on 12/3/2024.
Today's date: 12/5/2024
Expected result in a given Key Figure: 2 days
Idea of ​​calculation to be performed: 12/5/2024 - 12/3/2024 = difference of 2 days.

Thanks a lot for the help.

Clóvis Müller

entry.title: C4C and Twilio Integration
entry.content:
Hello,

Has anyone integrated C4C with Twilio for SMS functionality? If so, could you please share some insights on this? Additionally, I would like to see how the SMS integration UI appears in C4C for both inbound and outbound messages.

entry.title: 2502 C4C Release Discussion
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

When will this be published?

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: Predetermined URL for contacts
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm new to SAP, currently testing on a trial environment, and looking for creating predetermined URLs to access directly a specific contact. I review the following article, https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-cloud-for-customer/sap-cloud-for-customer-set-up-guide/predetermining-urls-for-direct-navigation, however I couldn't manage to create a URL bringing me directly to a specific contact. How can I find the UUID ? And what would be an example of URL ?

Thanks.

entry.title: '%20' prefix is coming while calling the mashup in sap c4c
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have configured a URL mashup to open s4 t-code using port binding Ticket Information and request parameter.

Now while previewing the mashup prefix '%20' is coming in every parameter. Due to that I am not able to open the URL and showing an invalid transaction error.

However, I have configured the same URL mashup with custom port binding where '%20' prefix is not coming for that and URL also opening.

Please help me find what I am missing. Why prefix is coming for standard port binding not in custom port binding.

 

SAP Cloud SDK SAP Sales Cloud SAP Service Cloud SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Extensibility

entry.title: Turn Off ML Categorization based on Ticket Type
entry.content:
Hi - is there a way to turn off ML Categorization for Service Cloud v1 based on Ticket type? For example, we only want to Turn on the ML for ticket types "Service Request", as for others, it shouldn't be working.

Cheers,

Marc

entry.title: $Batch Operation in OData for Account(CXXBOItem)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to have a batch operation on Accounts Custom Tab "CXX" which includes root "CXXBORootCollecton" and "CXXBOitemCollection".

We have to create records at the item level.When we try to post record we are able to successfully create with 201 created status.When we are trying to post using batch operation we are getting status 202 Accepted and the record is not created.

We have added the below body.

 

--batch

Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset

 

--changeset

Content-Type: application/http

Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary

 

POST CustomerCollection HTTP/1.1

Content-Type: application/json

Content-ID: 2

Content-Length: 10000

 

"CXXBORootCollection":[{

    "AccountID": "1XXXXX",

    "NID": "LX_XXXXX",

    "CXXBOitemCollection":

    [{ "CXXResponde_ID": "65XXXX", "Q3_NXX": "TEST1345", "Q1_CXX": "Test12345"}]

}]

 

 

--changeset--

--batch—

 

 

Could someone guide here with the syntax for batch at item level creation.
